allow: Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "$port=3000; $listeners=Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; if\(-not $listeners\){ Write-Output ''No listeners on port 3000.''; exit 0 }; Write-Output \(''Killing PIDs on port 3000: '' + \($listeners -join '', ''\)\); foreach\($pid in $listeners\){ Stop-Process -Id $pid -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 300; $remaining=Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($remaining\){ Write-Output ''Warning: a listener is still active on port 3000.''; exit 1 } else { Write-Output ''Port 3000 is now free.'' }")

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command '$port=3000; $listeners=Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; if\(-not $listeners\){ Write-Output ""No listeners on port 3000.""; exit 0 }; Write-Output \(""Killing PIDs on port 3000: "" + \($listeners -join "", ""\)\); foreach\($procId in $listeners\){ Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 300; $remaining=Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($remaining\){ Write-Output ""Warning: a listener is still active on port 3000.""; exit 1 } else { Write-Output ""Port 3000 is now free."" }')

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command '$port=3000; $conns=Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\(-not $conns\){ Write-Output ""No process is listening on port 3000.""; exit 0 }; $pids=$conns | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach\($id in $pids\){ $proc=Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter ""ProcessId=$id""; Write-Output \(""PID=""+$id+"" Name=""+$proc.Name+"" Cmd=""+$proc.CommandLine\) }')

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command 'Stop-Process -Id 20052 -Force; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 300; $left=Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($left\){ Write-Output ""Port 3000 still occupied.""; exit 1 } else { Write-Output ""Port 3000 cleared."" }')

Bash(powershell -Command "$conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { $pids = $conn | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach \($procId in $pids\) { Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force }; Write-Output \(''Stopped process IDs: '' + \($pids -join '', ''\)\) } else { Write-Output ''No process was listening on port 3000.'' }")

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command '$conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { $pids = $conn | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach \($procId in $pids\) { Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force }; Write-Output \(""Stopped process IDs: "" + \($pids -join "", ""\)\) } else { Write-Output ""No process was listening on port 3000."" }')
